**|   |
|---|
|# Background Info ![](data:image/png;base64,)<br><br>  <br><br>- Basil Silverhand of The Silverhands:<br>    <br><br>- The youngest of five boys. <br>    <br>- Basil believes he is the correct choice to take over the family crime syndicate<br>    <br><br>- He is currently on a quest to prove this. His plan is to steal something solo to prove his place in the pride<br>    <br>- He would like to start a new tradition through his crimes, but isn’t sure what that is yet. He idolizes Jennyanydots and Rum Tum Tugger for bettering the Silverhands. <br>    <br><br>- Growing up he constantly felt he was living in his brothers’ shadows. He does not respond well in situations where people look down on him. <br>    <br>- Has worked really hard to hone skills in all areas of crime instead of specializing in one. <br>    <br><br>- Family Info:<br>    <br><br>- The brothers<br>    <br><br>- Sage Silverhand -1st in line. Sage doesn’t work hard, because he feels his place is set by divine right. Basil hates Sage’s attitude. Training (strong word) to take over as the man with a plan. Half Katari Half Human<br>    <br>- Chicory Silverhand - Doesn’t want the throne. Chicory is building out drug industry connections for the family. Best at connections. Half Katari Half Infernis <br>    <br>- Thyme Silverhand - Married and deeply in love. The first to have children of the siblings. The muscle of the group. Half Katari Half Firblog<br>    <br>- Rue Silverhand - Incredibly persuasive. Is the smallest and uses that to lure people into a false sense of security. Can still pass as a child as an adult. Expert safe cracker. Half Katari Half Faerie.<br>    <br><br>  <br>  <br><br>- Mother is the current leader of The Silverhands<br>    <br><br>- Mother- Parsley Silverhand - to keep power she never married. Each child was from a different fling. None of them knew who she was. (Because all of them have a different dad the siblings are half Katari half something else.)<br>    <br>- Father- An unknown Emberkin. <br>    <br><br>- The Silverhands Crime Syndicate. <br>    <br><br>- The Silverhands go back several generations.<br>    <br>- Old Deuteronomy and Cassandra <br>    <br><br>- It is said their founder, Old Deuteronomy, started his life on the streets. He realized quickly he had a knack for mischief and manipulation. He started small pickpocketing and worked his way up from house robberies to stores. One day someone stole the most precious thing he had… his heart. Cassandra was the daughter of a wealthy mark. She noticed that an attractive man had been watching their home. Cassandra wanted out of her boring life and she knew what Old Deuteronomy was looking for, so she decided to steal it first. She managed, with very little trouble, to break into her father’s underground vault to steal a magical ring of great power. She left behind a calling card with instructions for Old Deuteronomy, which of course he followed. That ring became her wedding ring and that story started an infamous crime family. Their fame came from competition as Old Deuteronomy and Cassandra continued to try and one up each other's heists. When kids joined the picture they trained them. Families passed down traditions and secrets until they became what they are today. <br>    <br><br>- Jennyanydots <br>    <br><br>- After many a successful heist Jennyanydots brought something new to the scene. She was not your ordinary thief. Though she was a Silverhand, she had a heart of gold and cared deeply for those around her. She didn’t mind stealing from the rich, but also didn’t think the Silverhands needed to hold so much wealth. She began <br>    <br><br>  <br><br>giving back to the communities that the Silverhands hosted heists in. Many Silverhands laughed at this idea, until one day Jennyanydots was caught. A guard that worked at the prison helped her escape, because she had helped his family first. Charity was added to the Silverhands’ traditions after that.  <br><br>- Mistoffelees <br>    <br><br>- Mistoffelees was a gifted thief and crime stopped holding any appeal. He felt that after generations of crime the Silverhands had perfected the art. He needed something more. Mistoffelees decided to flirt with danger. He was known for stealing jewels off nobles mid ball. Not all important items could be stolen in public, so he would intentionally trip traps and tip off guards. Though future generations are not as extreme as Mistoffelees he began the trend of spectacle. There is no honor in an easy crime. Honor and status come from risk. <br>    <br><br>- Rum Tum Tugger <br>    <br><br>- The Rum Tum Tugger was the most charismatic of all the Silverhands. People would flock to him whenever he made an appearance at events. In fact nobles began inviting him personally to parties in hopes that he would steal from them. Since Silverhands only steal from the very best, Silverhands theft became a status symbol. This phenomenon also led to copycats and a system for hunting down outsiders that dare use their name. As a result of his place in society Rum Tum Tugger made sure that all future Silverhands had etiquette classes and private tutors. <br>    <br><br>- Mungojerrie & Rumpleteazer<br>    <br><br>- Mungojerrie and Rumpleteazer were the children of Cassandra and Old Deuteronomy. The crime organizations were left in their very capable hands and at first all was going well. Both siblings wanted to go in different directions, and having equal power led to a mid heist battle. Mungojerrie killed Rumpleteazer and started the tradition of one leader in power. He lost a sibling and an arm, but <br>    <br><br>  <br><br>continued to lead until he put his third daughter, Jennyanydots, on the throne. Though the honor often goes to the eldest it can also go to the Silverhand that makes the largest impact. <br><br>- Major Traditions<br>    <br><br>- Calling Card- Leaving a calling card with the Silverhands’ seal is a must. If copycats try to frame the Silverhands with a card the Silverhands will hunt them down. <br>    <br>- Spectacle- crime is too easy. True Silverhands enjoy the risk that comes from pulling off something truly impressive. This could be a heist in plain sight., adding something fun for the person that discovers the stolen item, waiting to get caught and escaping in the chaos, etc. Basically anything that proves this is more than an amateur crime. <br>    <br>- Charity- Since at this point the Silverhands only steal from the disgustingly wealthy they’ve incorporated acts of charity to their crimes. This was cleverly done to keep the common people on their side. If they are committing a heist in a town they local impoverished will benefit as well. <br>    <br><br>- Impactful Heists for Basil <br>    <br><br>- Blood Assassin Heist:<br>    <br><br>-  A few years before Basil left home his family pulled off a training heist on a group of assassins. Sage was leading without any help from Mother, so of course it didn’t go well. They got out, but barely. Basil was spotted by an elf blood assassin, Katya.. They fought and he barely escaped, no thanks to his brothers. She has been tracking him ever since. They have an ongoing flirtation. (it’s giving Sly Cooper and Carmelita Fox or Sherlock Holmes and The Woman)<br>    <br>- This fucked up mission is why Basil decided to leave home. Sage clearly sucks at leading and will get them all killed. <br>    <br>- Basil has lied to his party and told them that Katya was his stalker ex-girlfriend.|**
